title: APEX Supabase Helper Residue And Orchestration Wrapper Routing
objective: Execute the smallest safe follow-on routing tranche from packet 001g by copying only the reviewed archive-only Supabase helper residue artifacts into an explicit archive home and retaining DEPLOY_ORCHESTRATION.sql as historical lineage context beside the already-landed automation-orchestration lineage slice, while leaving lib/supabase.ts deferred and untouched.
dependency_note: Packet 001g completed the planning-only review and established explicit dispositions for the remaining Supabase helper slice. Packet 001h executes only the approved archive-only and lineage-only subset from that review.
constrained_outputs: An explicit archive home under archive/legacy-repos/apex-platform/ for the reviewed archive-only Supabase helper residue artifacts
A historical lineage retention copy of DEPLOY_ORCHESTRATION.sql beside the automation-orchestration lineage slice with non-operational lineage labeling
An execution handoff documenting routed files, deferred exclusions, and confirmation that lib/supabase.ts remained untouched
validation_steps: Confirm packet 001h copies only .env.example, deploy.ps1, DEPLOY_SCHEMA.sql, DEPLOY_ALL.sql, and DEPLOY_ORCHESTRATION.sql and does not broaden into the deferred frontend client surface
Confirm the four archive-only helper artifacts land under an explicit archive home with preserved Supabase source-root identity
Confirm DEPLOY_ORCHESTRATION.sql lands as historical lineage context only and is not presented as an active deployment entrypoint
Confirm lib/supabase.ts remains in place and untouched pending a future frontend boundary packet
sql_permission_note: Packet 001h authorizes bounded copy-only routing of reviewed helper residue and historical wrapper context. It does not authorize SQL execution, deployment, runtime edits, environment activation, or movement of deferred frontend code.
